basic_details.job_title: Kerala University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Kerala University (KU) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 14-05-2026 on the official website of Kerala University. Have been announced through the KU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Ph.D/NET qualification are eligible to apply for these Guest Faculty vacancies. The walk-in interview process for Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 18-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in interview through the direct links provided below in this article.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Kerala University recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Kerala University recruitment is Guest Faculty. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The essential qualifications required for the Guest Faculty post are Ph.D or NET qualification. Candidates must meet these criteria to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Faculty position is scheduled for 18 May 2026. Candidates should be present at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST categories are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Kerala University office in Thiruvananthapuram.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Guest Faculty position is Contract. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Kerala University's official website. A direct link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
